summary: Northland Capital Markets downgraded to Market Perform on Apr 27 (target $260). DA Davidson upgraded to Buy (target $375). Envision Research upgraded to Buy (agentic AI positioning). Consensus: 34 analysts, Buy, 29 Buy ratings, 0 Sell.
